name: Two eligible promotions (percent + fixed amount)
description: GetMemberPromotions program-process response. Envelope is { status, message, outputParameters } per the Run Program Process docs; the contents of outputParameters are IMPLEMENTER-DEFINED — `memberPromotions` here is a plausible default the adapter reads. Each promotion carries a reward the adapter applies as an ORDER-LEVEL discount.
notes: Unlike GPM promotion-execution, this does NOT return a priced cart — just eligible promotions. The adapter (PromotionApplier.applyMemberPromotions) applies each reward as an order-level discount. Confirm the real outputParameters field names with whoever configures the GetMemberPromotions process.
